items.title: Hi.
items.description: Hi. Over the last 24 hours we had three separate small incidents that affected Codex reliability. Those are three too many and we are taking active steps for them to not reproduce. I have reset usage limits for Codex across all paid plans.…
items.description_zh: 你好。在过去 24 小时内，我们发生了三起独立的小事件，影响了法典的可靠性。这三个太多了，我们正在采取积极措施，防止它们繁殖。我已经重置了所有付费计划中 Codex 的使用限制。...
